agent_sequence.objective: Collect documents, run all KYC and verification checks, perform initial serviceability check. Package completed file for Underwriter. Note: ASIC employer lookup result is blank — flag in file for Underwriter review.
agent_sequence.handoff_condition: All checks complete. No fraud indicators. KYC passed. ASIC result blank — flagged.

agent_sequence.objective: Apply credit policy, calculate DTI and LVR. Identify that ASIC employer lookup returned no data — employer cannot be confirmed within Underwriter delegated authority. Refer to Credit Manager with full assessment and referral reason.
agent_sequence.handoff_condition: ASIC employer lookup blank — employer unverifiable. Outside Underwriter authority to approve without confirmed employer registration.

agent_sequence.objective: Review referral from Underwriter. Assess employer verification gap against an otherwise strong profile (Equifax 782, DTI 5.1x, LVR 80%, ATO-confirmed income). Issue final credit decision.
agent_sequence.handoff_condition: Final decision within Credit Manager authority
